description: Assign uniform applied distributed load (force per unit length) to all beam elements in the range. Positive loads acts in the positive \(y\) - or \(z\) -directions ( f1 and f2 , respectively) of the element coordinate system and maintains this orientation during large-strain motion. Point loads are applied at the nodes using the command structure node apply .

6.0.description: Assign uniform applied distributed loads. Loads (force per unit length) are applied to all elements in the range. Positive loads act in the positive y- or z-directions (f1 and f2, respectively) of the element system and maintain this orientation during large-strain motion. Point loads are applied at the nodes using the command structure node apply.

7.0.description: Assign uniform applied distributed loads. Loads (force per unit length) are applied to all elements in the range. Positive loads act in the positive \(y\)- or \(z\)-directions (f1 and f2, respectively) of the element system and maintain this orientation during large-strain motion. Point loads are applied at the nodes using the command structure node apply.

9.0.syntax: structure beam apply <f1><f2>[range] only 1 component in 2D
